name: Citrus Sunset
recipeIngredient: 1 package JELL-O Brand Gelatin, any flavor
1 package Sugar-Free JELL-O Orange Flavor Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the red gelatin as directed on the package.
2. Pour the prepared red gelatin into 8 dessert glasses.
3. Refrigerate for about 1 hour or until set but not firm.
4. Meanwhile, prepare the orange gelatin as directed on the package.
5. Refrigerate the orange gelatin for about 30 minutes or until slightly thickened.
6. Evenly spoon the prepared orange gelatin over the red gelatin in each glass.
7. Refrigerate for an additional 2 hours or until firm.
8. Garnish with an orange twist before serving.
